title: phaius vestitus
intro: Phaius vestitus, also known as the yellow orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Phaius vestitus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Phaius vestitus is often prepared as a herbal remedy, typically in the form of a tea or tincture, which can be made by boiling the roots and leaves in water or using a solvent like ethanol.
